hero.name: Joel Leon
hero.description: I turn designs and ideas into fast, accessible, real-world interfaces — with clean code and an eye for detail. 2.5+ years building for teams and clients across the US, in React, Next.js, and TypeScript.

about.title: About
about.paragraph1: Hi, I'm Joel — a frontend engineer based in Lima, Peru, working remotely with teams and clients across the US and LATAM. Over the last 2.5+ years I've grown from junior developer into building responsive, user-focused interfaces with React, Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS.
about.paragraph2: I care about the details that make an interface feel right: clean, maintainable code, smooth interactions, performance, and accessibility. I use AI tools like Claude and Cursor to move faster — while owning and understanding every line I ship.
about.paragraph3: Before tech, I worked as an IT recruiter sourcing senior engineers for US companies, which gives me an unusual edge: I understand how teams hire, communicate, and grow. Bilingual (EN/ES), I'm at my best collaborating directly with clients — turning requirements and feedback into results.

contact.title: Let's build something
contact.paragraph: Open to remote frontend roles and collaborations. If you're looking for someone reliable, detail-oriented, and easy to work with — let's talk.

footer.builtWith: Built with React, TypeScript, Tailwind & Motion
